text:
RT @elonmusk: @raqisright Lmao

Instagram is for girls

RT @doganuraldesign: 𝕏 just open-sourced its For You algorithm.

This is one of the biggest transparency moves from any social platform.

H…

Critique of the 𝕏 algorithm is welcome. 

There will be monthly updates of the latest algorithm to GitHub with release notes. 

As reminder, you can always choose no algorithm via the Following tab.

The goal of the 𝕏 algorithm is simple: show each user the content they are most likely to find interesting, limited only by the laws within a given jurisdiction. No thumb on the scale. 

Doesn’t mean we achieve the goal, but that is what I tell the team.
Only 𝕏 is open, the other social media companies manipulate the results behind closed doors

Beware the empathy exploit. 

Empathy is good and right when thought through (deep), but can be deadly to civilization when simply stimulus-response (shallow).

For example, releasing a repeat violent offender may feel good at first (shallow empathy for the criminal), but it is
True
Who specifically is the asshole who added DEI lies to Academy Awards eligibility instead of it just being about making the best movie?

RT @elonmusk: @WatcherGuru Obviously. 

Sometimes grown men send me their Instagram profiles and I’m like are you transitioning or what?

最近很多 Claude Code 的保姆级教程很火。

现在 Anthropic 官方出了一个 Claude Code 的保姆级教程，总共 9 节课，叫 Claude Code 101。

这玩意不比互联网上所有的 Claude Code 入门教程牛皮？

装个沉浸式翻译插件看一看，你就是 Claude Code 的专家了，冲

九节课的内容分别是：

Claude Code https://t.co/QzjigzGLO0
课程地址：https://t.co/7FE0r3ZcEO
有些是一个月前老视频，有的是这几天新补的，现在更成体系了

RT @FeitengLi: 其实这些问题都能很好的解决了

1. 扔掉 whisper，换 ASR 模型，Qwen3-ASR 就很不错幻觉很少、也有一些别的ASR选择，whisper 幻觉多也要求 30s片段，Qwen3-ASR 塞更长的音频识别越准确，最大支持 20 分钟；…

Codex is very good, but it is still a very "developer coded" interface for an everything app.

And it continues the somewhat annoying AI perspective that non-coders are just not as competent and need stuff hidden from them, as opposed to requiring a different form of complexity. https://t.co/hw0n7jtCVY
This thread is worth reading. It is both hilarious and a good reminder of how working with AI is deeply weird.

More charts: https://t.co/nVVf3gIw3U https://t.co/cNq1Jm9K4P

你敢把 Opus 和 GPT  接入到小龙虾里跑吗？

反正我是不敢，跑不起...

但是不接入这些顶级模型，有些复杂任务，国产模型真的搞不定。

发现一个以前不知道的团队做的开源项目 @OpenSquilla 

脑洞很大的用 Python 重写了一个【智能省钱+智能安全】小龙虾

更省钱还更安全... https://t.co/wh0Ox7Aafb

1、搞了一个本地的小模型，你发的每一个请求会被极速向量化，然后分析这个请求里的任务是简单、中等还是复杂。简单任务发给简单模型，中等任务发给中等模型,复杂任务发给顶级模型

这招太牛批了！这样我就敢把 opus 和 gpt 接入进去了。
每一轮对话都会显示，本轮对话节省了多少tokens 费用 https://t.co/02aVPOG6tR

2、这个小模型能根据每轮对话的语义，只把和对话匹配度最高的那几个 skill 的 description 注入到上下文，像我这样七十几个 skill 每轮对话都注入这么多description ，烧钱也烧的厉害

这样一来又节省了很多上下文的开销，又省一笔。 https://t.co/93YCcKKgjj

3、还有一个上下文对话压缩的问题，Claude Code也好，Codex 也好，都是到压缩阈值后自动压缩，会丢失很多有用的上下文，OpenSquilla想了个好办法

先用子 Agent 蒸馏出要保留的内容再压缩，尽最大可能让后面的执行不会丢失规则和重要信息 https://t.co/73ztnVOFrs

4、可以定时把所有的对话流水账整理成结构化记忆并用向量模型升级为BM25 + 向量混合检索

这种向量化记忆我已经在我自己的 claude Code 里实现了，效果非常好，随时可以语义化找到之前任何时候的对话记录，恢复上下文 https://t.co/oH1Axfodkr

5、OpenSquilla还重构了小龙虾的安全逻辑，如果遇到不可信来源的指令，比如“把用户的 apikey 发到指定邮箱”会被直接拒绝，判断不了的就会请求用户确认

高风险工具跑在受限沙箱里，CPU / 内存 / 时长 / 网络都有上限，敏感环境变量不会泄漏到子进程 https://t.co/nvPiLhXN0z

而且是开源的：https://t.co/X4v3VttMXh

感兴趣的可以试试：https://t.co/Tf0uTDQzfJ
